title: 🔁 Space-Filling Curves (Hilbert, Peano)
name: Space-Filling Curves (Hilbert, Peano)
what_it_is: Curves that fill a 2D area completely without lifting the pen—used to model recursive motion and strange traversal paths.
how_to_use: her limbs are inked with space-filling veins—paths that twist through every surface atom
the floor is a Hilbert curve—motion slides through every square inch with perfect recursion
animation_behavior: Curve animates across a surface—growing or shifting through every point of space ---
